ui._doc: English baseline / source of truth. Other locales overlay this. Missing key = fallback to this file's value or, ultimately, the literal key.
ui._chrome: page chrome — h1, subtitles, breadcrumb crumbs
ui.hub_status: Quietly warming up. More worlds and companion tools — landing soon.
ui.hub_card_p69_desc: Idol production stage. Bring your favorites under the spotlight.
ui.p69_subtitle: Tools to take the show home with you.
ui.p69_card_converter_desc: Coming from an older version? Drop your old MY FAV file here — your songs follow you straight into the collection editor.
ui.p69_card_editor_desc: Browse the catalog, pick the songs you'll keep close, and take them back to the show. Build different lists for different nights — swap them in whenever.
ui.converter_subtitle: Coming from an older version? Drop your MY FAV here and we'll continue in the collection editor.
ui.converter_step_drop_h: Drop your old MY FAV file
ui.converter_step_drop_body: Look for a file named like Preset_My Favorites_Data*.vap — that's the one with your songs in it. The matching UI file is just the buttons, not what you want here.
ui.converter_drop_zone_text: Drop file here, or click to browse.
ui.converter_drop_zone_aria: Drop file here or click to browse
ui.converter_hint: Your songs will be waiting in the collection editor. Refine the list there, then take them back to the show when you're ready — or take them back right away if you'd rather not change a thing.
ui.editor_subtitle: Pick the songs you'll keep close. Take them back to the show whenever you're ready.
ui.editor_history_drop_title: Drop the history — your collection stays
ui.editor_empty_collection_html:
Empty here.
Load a saved one to edit, or start picking from the catalog →
ui.empty_recent_body: Hm, empty here. Maybe come around more often? Bring back a list saved from the in-game collection export, and what you've been playing will show up. Play more with me.
ui.empty_most_played_body: Every play, she's quietly keeping count. Bring back a list saved from the in-game collection export to see what you've been playing the most.
ui.modal_export_question: How would you like to take it back?
ui.modal_export_with_desc: Whatever's currently in the show (RECENT, MOST PLAYED) will be overwritten by what's here. Best for restoring a full snapshot.
ui.modal_export_safe_desc: RECENT and MOST PLAYED in the show stay where they are. Great for keeping different lists for different moods — swap them in whenever, without losing what's already counted.
ui.banner_handoff: Brought {n} song{s} in for you. Refine, then take them back when you're ready.
ui.confirm_clear_history_tail: The history riding along stays — drop that separately if you want.
ui.confirm_drop_history:
Drop the history?

After this, what you take back will be just the songs — RECENT and MOST PLAYED in the show stay where they are. Your collection isn't touched. Undoable.
ui.confirm_swap_import: Swap your current ({summary}) for what's in the file ({incoming})?
ui.alert_export_empty: Nothing to take back yet — pick some songs first.
ui.alert_import_invalid: That file isn't the right shape — try a .p69save you exported from the show.
ui.alert_import_no_songs: No songs found in that file. Make sure it's a .p69save you exported earlier.
